prompt: A soft, luminous illustration of a young blonde woman kneeling in a sun-dappled flower meadow, wearing a vintage white lace dress with puffed sleeves, scalloped hem and a delicate black ribbon bow at the collar; long straight golden hair adorned with a crown of white blossoms, mint-green eyes and a gentle, knowing smile. Warm golden hour lighting filters through nearby trees, casting floral-shaped shadows across her legs and scattering glowing butterflies and floating pollen motes. Surrounding white flowers, lush grass, and a deep forest backdrop create a dreamy, enchanted atmosphere. Painterly, high-detail anime-style rendering with soft skin shading, intricate fabric textures, subtle film grain, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, warm pastel palette, volumetric light rays and delicate rim lighting. Emphasize delicate facial expression, floral details, natural shadows, and a tranquil, magical mood.
